headline: Ziff Davis Stock Soars After Selling This Business Unit For $1.2 Billion
summary: Media stock Ziff Davis continues to climb after the company on March 3 disclosed it is selling its Connectivity division to Accenture for $1.2 billion.  The sale value for that business unit is not that far below Ziff Davis' annual revenue, which amounted to $1.45 billion over the past four quarters.  The sale gave struggling Ziff Davis a boost and its stock soared 48% on March 3 in massive volume.

headline: Is Accenture's Cheap Valuation Reason Enough to Invest in the Stock?
summary: ACN trades at a steep discount and leans into GenAI growth, but weak price performance and rising talent costs raise doubts about whether now is the right time to buy.

headline: Accenture Set to Report Q2 Earnings: Here's What You Should Know
summary: ACN gears up for second-quarter fiscal 2026 results, with a y/y revenue rise of 6.6% and growth across key segments. Earnings are also expected to rally.

headline: Accenture and Databricks Accelerate Enterprise Adoption of AI Applications and Agents at Scale

headline: Microsoft shakes up Copilot AI leadership team, freeing up Suleyman to build new models
summary: Microsoft is doubling down on its superintelligence group to build models, while consolidating engineering efforts for its Copilot assistants.

headline: Morgan Stanley Updates Accenture (ACN) View on Weak Bookings and Talent Shift
summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is included among the 15 Best Safe Dividend Stocks for 2026. On March 16, Morgan Stanley analyst James Faucette lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) to $240 from $320. The firm reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The change comes ahead of the company’s fiscal Q2 earnings report, […]
